recommendations.title: Return to Never Land
recommendations.overview: In 1940, the world is besieged by World War II. Wendy, all grown up, has two children; including Jane, who does not believe Wendy's stories about Peter Pan.

recommendations.title: Casper Meets Wendy
recommendations.overview: When a warlock threatens Wendy the Good Little Witch, she and her aunts hide out at a resort where Casper the Ghost is vacationing with his uncles. Although Casper and Wendy are told ghosts and witches don't get along, the two are kindred spirits! Th

recommendations.title: Code Name: Emperor
recommendations.overview: Juan, a secret service agent, approaches Wendy, a young Filipina who works as a maid for a suspicious couple.

recommendations.title: 100 Girls
recommendations.overview: Matthew, a college freshman, meets his dream girl in a dorm elevator during a blackout. He never sees her face, but instantly falls in love. In the morning, the power is restored, but the "dream girl" has vanished. All Matthew knows is that she lives

recommendations.title: Freaks - You're One of Us
recommendations.overview: After having a chance encounter with a mysterious character, Wendy, a young working class mother, discovers that she has super powers.

recommendations.title: Wendy Wu: Homecoming Warrior
recommendations.genres: Family, Action, Adventure, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: It is the story of an average, popular American teenager named Wendy Wu who discovers that in order to win the coveted crown she must first learn the way of the warrior. Wendy Wu has a one track mind, and that track leads directly to the title of hom

recommendations.title: The Shining
recommendations.overview: Jack Torrance accepts a caretaker job at the Overlook Hotel, where he, along with his wife Wendy and their son Danny, must live isolated from the rest of the world for the winter. But they aren't prepared for the madness that lurks within.

recommendations.title: Love on the Sidelines
recommendations.overview: A down-on-her-luck young woman who falls into a job as a personal assistant to a star quarterback sidelined with an injury. He's never had a female assistant before and she knows nothing about football.

recommendations.title: Wendy
recommendations.overview: A re-imagining of "Peter Pan" from the point of view of Wendy Darling, who finds herself lost on a mysterious island where aging and time have come unglued. She must fight to save her family, her freedom and the joyous spirit of youth.

recommendations.title: Russian Dolls
recommendations.overview: Five years after their summer together in Barcelona, Xavier, William, Wendy, Martine and Isabelle reunite.
